disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recurrent episodes of intense burning redness/warmth over the face, neck and upper chest, lasting minutes and coming in waves
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the flushing — where is it and how long does it last?
Does the redness come and go in episodes?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My face, neck and top of my chest go bright red and burning hot, in waves that last a few minutes and then ease, then come back.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profuse watery diarrhoea with cramping, up to 10 times today, ongoing
trigger_question_examples: How many times have you opened your bowels today?
Is the diarrhoea watery, and are you managing to keep fluids down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's completely watery, with cramps, and I've been to the toilet maybe ten times today — it just won't stop.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New tight, wheezy chest with breathlessness over the last 2 hours
trigger_question_examples: When did the breathing trouble start?
Is your chest tight or wheezy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: In the last couple of hours my chest has gone tight and wheezy and I'm struggling to catch my breath — that's new.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symptoms flared dramatically after drinking alcohol earlier this evening
trigger_question_examples: Did anything seem to set this off?
Had you eaten or drunk anything unusual beforehand?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had a few drinks earlier and within a short time the flushing, diarrhoea and breathing all got much worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Longstanding milder episodes of flushing and loose stools, with recent puffy ankles and unintentional weight loss
trigger_question_examples: Have you had milder versions of this before?
Any weight change or ankle swelling recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had smaller bouts of flushing and loose stools on and off for a while, my ankles have been a bit puffy, and I've lost some weight without trying.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No known allergies, no new foods, no new or recent medications and no recent antibiotics
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any allergies, and have you eaten anything new?
Any new medicines or recent antibiotics?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No allergies that I know of, nothing new to eat, and I'm not on any regular medicines — no antibiotics recently either.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sensation of a racing/pounding heart during the episode
trigger_question_examples: Does your heart feel like it's racing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, my heart feels like it's going really fast and pounding while this is happening.
